           PrEcise MEasurements).                                 2310400100015 
INC-SOURCE (PHOTO) Electron beam strikes a depleted uranium       2310400100016 
           target producing bremsstrahlung and neutrons with an   2310400100017 
           average flux of 3.4 X 10**13 neutrons/s.               2310400100018 
DETECTOR   (HPGE) The detectors of resolution of 0.75 keV at      2310400100019 
           122 keV and an absolute efficiency of 0.01.            2310400100020

INC-SPECT  (EN-RSL) neutron energy window width                   2310400100022

            systematic component.                                 2310400100025
